brand.name: Beena's Bake House
tagline_candidates: Baked at home. Delivered with love. Since the turn of the century.
Twenty-five years of butter, flour and you.

location.service_area_note: Home delivery within Trivandrum only. No walk-in storefront.

kinetic_loader_steps.step: Bone Cream (#FBF7F0) full-screen flash; "Beena's Bake House" wordmark draws in via SVG stroke-dasharray in Deep Cocoa (#3A2E2A), Fraunces italic.
Butter Yellow (#FFE26E) pill slides in from bottom; eyebrow "Est. 2000 · Trivandrum" in JetBrains Mono.
Butter Yellow curtain wipes down-out via clip-path; hero image resolves opacity 0->1 + scale 1.08->1.

hero.subtitle: Custom butter cakes, made to order, delivered across Trivandrum.

image_primary.alt: Baker's hands shaping pita dough on a flour-dusted wooden board in warm light

image_alt.alt: Tight stack of freshly baked golden, flaky croissants

story.h2: A quarter-century in a Kerala kitchen
paragraphs: What began in the year 2000 as a single home oven and a handwritten order book has grown into twenty-five years of butter cakes, weddings, birthdays, and everyday indulgences delivered across Trivandrum.

Every cake is still made to order, by hand, in our home kitchen. No walk-in counters, no shortcuts — just fresh butter, real chocolate, and the recipes that have kept Trivandrum celebrating for a generation.
We are proud that 88% of customers who reviewed us on Facebook recommend us to their friends. That is the whole point of Beena's Bake House.

pull_quote.text: Let's face it, a nice creamy chocolate cake does a lot for a lot of people; it does for me.

images.alt: Close-up of hands mixing flour on a weathered wooden board
Baker's hands kneading dough with motion blur
Bakery window full of bread loaves with warm interior glow

signature_cakes.h2: Made to order, made for you

items.name: Pastel Macarons Tower
items.summary: Hand-piped almond macarons in mint and blush, with eucalyptus styling.

image.alt: Pastel mint and blush macarons on weathered grey wood with eucalyptus

items.name: Buttery Croissants
items.summary: 36-hour laminated dough, fresh every morning by special order.

items.name: Celebration Buttercream Cake
items.summary: Yellow buttercream, macarons and gold leaf — the anniversary classic.

image.alt: Elegant pastel yellow celebration cake with macarons

items.name: Deep Chocolate Cake
items.summary: The cake we are known for — deep cocoa, real butter, delivered to your door.

image.alt: Rich chocolate cake with glaze on a wooden board

items.name: Country Sourdough
items.summary: For when a cake isn't quite right — long-fermented, hand-scored.

image.alt: Round sourdough loaf with scored crust on a cutting board

signature_cakes.price_disclaimer: Prices are placeholders for layout. Final prices confirmed with Beena on order.

menu.subtitle: Every order is made fresh — please call or WhatsApp to confirm availability.

steps.title: Order
steps.body: Call or WhatsApp. Tell us the occasion, flavours, and number of guests.

steps.title: Plan
steps.body: We work out size, design and price together. No surprises.

steps.title: Bake
steps.body: Fresh butter, real chocolate, made-by-hand, the morning of delivery.

steps.title: Deliver
steps.body: Across Trivandrum, to your door, ready to celebrate.

Hand placing fresh berries on a chocolate-glazed celebration cake

visit_contact.hours_note: Available by phone and WhatsApp. Fresh bakes by order; please allow advance notice for celebration cakes.
